name: EXOTERRA: A Space Journey
description: EXOTERRA: A Space Journey is a first-person science fiction puzzle game set aboard a stranded ship in the vast, dark expanse of outer space. Explore the HOPE-03 and uncover the mysteries it holds as you solve fully interactive escape-room-style chambers powered by a physics-based system.

name: GLOCKTOPUS
description: Glocktopus is a free-to-play 3D comedy puzzle game where you control an armed octopus, using your trusty sidearm, aquatic gadgets, and clever environmental interactions to overcome comedic challenges and escape the aquarium in pursuit of the local mafia’s Golden Gun.

name: Missing Texture
description: Missing Texture is a psychological horror experience told in chapters. Download the free Launcher and access all main chapters at no cost. The full story expands through additional games.

name: NEOTAG LEAGUE
description: Team up and beat your opponents in NEOTAG LEAGUE, the futuristic sport where sci-fi parkour robots fight for the ball to score points! Jump, roll, wall run, grapple, dodge and attack in this team-based multiplayer game.

name: HONOR 2
description: Play as "Chris" as you explore a fleshed-out world, rich in personalities, Level grind with the Turn-Based Battle system as you unlock new Special attacks, and discover secret paths, enemies, and bosses along the way! Features beautiful artwork, music, and voice talent!

name: 街灯 -machinohi-
description: Do you remember? Those "rules" we made for the walk home. In the eighth grade, the rule I set for myself was: "I can only stay in the dark for five seconds." A silent Japanese night. You must reach the next pool of light before the five seconds are up. Can you make it back home safely?

name: After the Stream Went Dark
description: Step into the world of Nyx, a VTuber whose online persona begins to blur with something far more unsettling. After the Stream Went Dark is a short psychological horror visual novel exploring identity, self-perception, and the fragile boundary between performance and reality.

name: Duality Shift
description: Duality Shift is a Singleplayer First Person Racing-Platformer: Run, Jump, perform Parkour moves and completely alter the reality that is around you on your way to the top of the online leaderboards and uncover the secrets of this world along the way.

name: Resort Island Simulator: Prologue
description: A world filled with tricksters, pirates, zealots, and treasures. An ocean full of danger and prize. Face dilemmas and encounters. Manage a resort in this wild world and build a thriving business. An Explorer, a Survivor a Resorter or a Trader? Forge your own path to wealth. Make Resort Prosper!

name: Witch Switched
description: A "man" is transformed into a woman by a vengeful witch and realizes she likes it better this way.

name: The Red Pearls Of Borneo
description: A detective noir puzzle deduction game. Explore a non-linear timeline as a clairvoyant investigator in 1941 Borneo. Jump between time and locations to uncover motives and discover what truly happened in the Goodwill tobacco plantation that fateful night on the eve of the WW2 Japanese invasion.

name: Loop Tower: Prologue
description: Loop Tower tells the story of adventurers climbing an endless tower. Place it on a corner of your desktop and help them continue their ascent. Experience a fresh blend of desktop idle gameplay + roguelike + RPG right now!

name: Noneday
description: Grab your notebook and get ready to explore every nook and cranny of the surreal, esoteric adventure game Noneday! Search dreams for clues, solve puzzles, and unlock the secrets hiding within Bow’s own mind.

name: 王于兴师/Order of Kings
description: Jump into a true real-time strategy, and fully 3D battles! Order of Kings is an MMO game mixing RTS and SLG. You can control massive troops, plan combining 3D terrain and physical collision effects, join in alliances with friends, compete with other server players, and build your own legend!

name: 8 Ball Pro Online
description: 3D 8-ball pool game; featuring spin control, jump shots, and various game modes. Aim your shots, adjust the ball's position, and clear the table. Play against the computer, challenge a friend locally, or compete in online PvP.

name: Synthopolis
description: Face off and claim the Color at all costs — the life-saving resource of humanity hidden in the mysterious city of Synthopolis. Outplay your opponent in this competitive and visually groundbreaking game.

name: Chronicles: Immortal Sect
description: Chronicles: Immortal Sect is a captivating Eastern fantasy RPG where humans, immortals, and demons coexist. Begin your journey as a novice cultivator: choose your celestial abode, explore ancient realms, uncover hidden secrets, and partner with Dao Companions to achieve ascension.

name: 功夫Online
description: 「功夫Online」是一款角色扮演冒险游戏，免费开玩。 游戏特色： 1，万法皆修·功夫自由； 2，自动战斗·操作自由； 3，自动挂机·托管自由； 4，自动寻路·跨地图畅行； 5，穿越金手指·逆天改命。

name: 饲养染的30 DAYS
description: A story, a wish Everything seems to be nothing unusualBut realizing a wish always comes at a cost. The visual novel 『饲养染的30DAYS』will present you with a 'normal' ending. Find your 'puzzle' in story .

name: 热血屠龙
description: 《热血屠龙》以“经典大陆探索、六道轮回剧情、公平经济系统”为核心，回归传奇本质，打造纯粹热血体验。无论是散人玩家还是公会团队，均能在玛法大陆中找到属于自己的热血征程。

name: コインスロット
description: It's a coin pusher game where you can drop a large number of coins. Try to line up the numbers to win coins!

name: JIAN YING JIANG HU
description: The story opens with a family massacre, telling the chaotic Wuxia world under the darkness, you will play a warrior, out of the family door, set foot on the heroic river lake road of chivalrousness, to save the Central plains of the wind and rain.

name: Tactics Weaver
description: A unified turn-based and real-time battle system in a world with unstable gravity. Weave between combat types by exploiting weaknesses in gravity. Attacking measures nearby gravity.

name: At Night: The Student
description: Open your eyes, get ready for school, and try to follow your usual routine. With your mother away, the responsibility of getting through the day falls on you.

name: Vanished Puzzle Quest
description: Vanished is an immersive, first-person puzzle adventure where an encroaching fog of forgetfulness which has robbed everyone at the Great Centers of Islamic Science of their memories and you must now battle against a mysterious foe to reclaim memory, history, and purpose.

name: 아무 일도 없었다.
description: Endure the gaze inside the elevator.

name: Yelling At Cats: The Game
description: A short and silly horror game where you play as a cat with an owner experiencing Coprolalia and must find out what has made them so angry by staring at them long enough without being caught.

name: Crack Mountain
description: You can wish for anything, all you need to do is climb this mountain... By throwing a ball that teleports you... Maybe try climbing too, I don't know I'm not the expert here.

name: Notebook Battlegrounds
description: Gather a few friends for this multiplayer game where your voice is the weapon. Play as letters in a notebook with proximity voice chat. Say the funny words on your screen to shoot opponents, find secret words for special powers, and battle in Deathmatch or Battle Royale (Solo/Duos)!

name: The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin
description: <The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin> is an open-world anime RPG set in the universe of [The Seven Deadly Sins]. Step into the role of Prince Tristan of Liones and explore an open-world Britannia, as you embark on a journey to restore order to a world thrown into chaos by the collision of time and space.

name: Loong Reversi
description: At the 50th move, the world expands. A cinematic redefinition of Reversi featuring simultaneous multi-language support.

name: Celestial Bond
description: "Celestial Bond" is an open-world MMORPG with an Eastern fantasy theme, offering players a unique experience of a vast, Chinese-style fantasy world, sword flight, cultivation adventures, guild social interaction, and immersive action RPG combat.

name: Dream of YukiHana
description: A fan-made bullet hell shooting game featuring "Hololive 5th Generation" as the main characters, with "Yukihana Lamy" at the center of the story.

name: CAI UWE
description: Experience CAI UWE: Your AI companion in Unreal Engine 5 graphics. Chat in real-time with a Metahuman that responds without scripts. The perfect "Idler" for your second monitor — connected with Twitch, YouTube & Discord. A next-generation experimental tech demo.

name: Rest Area Simulator: Prologue
description: Take over the gas station and convenience store at a roadside rest area and expand by purchasing new businesses. Manage a living world shaped by dynamic economy and random events. Upgrade your facilities, satisfy your customers, and play solo or with friends.

name: Beat Survival
description: Beat Survival is a 2D pixel action-adventure survival game where you can play as a single player or in 2-player local co-op. where you start driving around, looting, crafting, fishing, dismantling, and doing more missions. Fight many creatures and zombies, and interact with NPCs.

name: FEED
description: "FEED" is a bite-sized retro point-and-click puzzle game. It features multiple puzzles and a touch of cult horror.

name: Chickenfinger's Rally
description: A sim-cade side scrolling car game, with pretty environments and fast-paced driving conditions.

name: Maestro
description: Make your way to the top of the mysterious Casino by shooting Cards, Gambling, Upgrading your cards and create your optimal build in this Fast Paced First Person Roguelite.

name: UKNON Jones - Portal
description: In this platform and puzzle game, Elsa LOVELUST is equipped with a gate gun. You must destroy objects or teleport her through the portals to help her cross inaccessible places and reach the flag of the different levels of the game.

name: Minesweeper Arena
description: Find all the mines quicker than your friends in the classic puzzle game.

name: Culinary Mayhem
description: Culinary Mayhem is a stylized, fast-paced shooter, where food is your enemy. That is inspired by other FPS games in this genre. Quickly Pulverize all the food in your dreams with kitchenware to help the Chef get his Stars back.

name: Ivory Quest
description: Cast spells by reading music! Learn treble and bass clef the fun way. Perfect for music students of all ages. Works with MIDI connected instruments.

name: Us Five Forever
description: Olivia Herrera's closest friend Kyle went missing at a frat house two years ago. A party at that frat house is her chance to investigate what happened to him, and get to the bottom of a strange connection she shares with her former group of friends.

name: AstralOutlaw
description: Astral Outlaw is a 3D sci-fi survival game made by Korean high schoolers. Explore an abandoned station, scavenge for scrap, and craft tools to repair your broken ship. Master repair mini-games and manage resources to escape the void.

name: Idle Library
description: Turn a small reading room into a legendary archive of knowledge in this relaxing idle incremental game featuring research upgrades, prestige progression, and offline growth

name: Astralyte
description: Mine rocks, gather materials, and craft crystals in a calm, system-driven world. A relaxing single-player experience focused on mining, progression, and discovery.

name: Blame your Aim
description: The most Causal aimtrainer, that works. Keep it on top while watching videos, listening to lectures, or even sitting through long meetings. Thanks to the transparency and seamless window switching, your focus can stay on what you're watching or doing — while your muscle memory keeps improving.

name: Letterwork
description: Do your chores as fast as possible to survive. Upgrade your letters and abilities to create broken builds and beat your own high-score in this free typing-arcade-roguelike.

name: Ragnarok X: Next Generation
description: Ragnarok X: Next Generation (Ragnarok X: Together) is a cross-platform 3D MMORPG officially licensed by Gravity. Faithful to the classic spirit of Ragnarok Online, you will meet Adventurers from all walks of life to explore the continent of Midgard and share a heartfelt, memorable adventure.

name: Draw, Draw, Pass!
description: Will your friends make a masterpiece or a mess? Collaborate together on a single canvas to bring a random prompt to life — but be careful, this drawing game gets more chaotic with more people!

name: BeastBreak: Monster Horde Shooter
description: Fight for survival in a fast-paced monster shooter focused on intense encounters, powerful weapons, and escalating boss battles. Unlock new gear, master your loadout, and prove your skill on global leaderboards.

name: Rite of Eris
description: Rite of Eris is a survival roguelike inspired by the likes of Vampire Survivors, Hades, and more. Unlock new characters, each with their own unique abilities, then jump into battle, unlocking powerful abilities along the way to aid your conquest against hordes of enemies.

name: MooN CASTLE
description: In mysterious Silvermoon Castle, brave adventurers explore levels, fight monsters, collect items/keys, level up, uncover secrets, and challenge the final boss in a strategic, thrilling fantasy adventure.

name: Spinbot Arena
description: SPINBOT ARENA is an arena fighting game up to 4 players where you kick out your opponents in shifting arenas.

name: Stringate
description: Stringate is a level-based puzzle game with portals and other complex mechanics.

name: Netoo
description: Netoo is a minimalist logic puzzle where you try to place small magnets into their correct spots by rotating transporter magnets with rotators. The difficulty of the game increases gradually, thanks to new mechanics introduced every 10 levels.

name: Aura
description: Play as Aura, a powerful young sorcerer battling through monster-filled dungeons where chaotic portals spawn hordes of enemies. Level up, upgrade attributes and spells, and restore order to the dungeons with guidance from a mysterious mushroom companion.

name: The Slayer's Rest
description: Step into Quixote’s mind and battle fearsome monsters in intense mental training. Dodge enemies, beat your high score, and earn coins to unlock upgrades and level up your skills.

name: My Beautiful Misinterpretation of Words
description: "My Beautiful Misinterpretation of Words" is a collection of experimental art games I vomited over the span of a year. The gameplay and visuals dramatically varies every moment. One may say it is less of a "game" but more of an "experience". Now, I welcome you into my mind.

name: Reciros
description: Reciros is a multiplayer magic FPS where guns are replaced by elemental spells. Combine elements to create unique abilities and adapt your playstyle. Play King of the Hill or objective-based team modes online with Steam friends and prove you're the most powerful wizard.

name: RhythmStrike
description: Rhythm game inspired by modern Japanese arcade titles, featuring intense visuals and gameplay, dynamic keyboard and mouse controls, and community integration. Climb the global leaderboards and unlock new content through specialized challenges!

name: HUNTED
description: A sit 'n' survive set on board a spaceship. Aliens have made it inside, and you need to defend yourself. Viewing cameras, shutting doors, blocking vents, and sounding alarms is your only hope. You must last 5 days while backup arrives.

name: Water Womb World
description: Aqua Catholicism; Explore Man's Original Sin Under The Sea

name: VVINTERCORE
description: A visual psychological horror novel set in a winter setting. You have a unique opportunity to explore your relationships with your friends, and then with yourself. But be careful, a blizzard seems to be approaching.

name: ⟨Unknown_Terminal⟩
description: Retro terminal mystery: explore a live IBM PS/2, decode corrupted logs, and learn who waits behind the blinking prompt.

name: Halloween Filled With Cats
description: Purrfectly Spooky Halloween awaits you! 🎃🐾 Dive into hand-drawn Halloween scene filled with cute, sneaky cats hiding in every corner. Relax, explore whimsical illustration, enjoy subtle animations, and see how many feline friends you can find in this cozy hidden object adventure.

name: Escape Up
description: Escape Up if you can. Climb the tower and defeat the monsters as you try to escape. Killing all the monsters in a room will unlock the next room. Challenge others climbers on the leaderboards and see how fast you can manage to escape. Ready, set, climb!

name: Royal Vermin
description: Climb, throw and survive in a chaotic party game for 2 to 4 players!

name: Pizza Panic!
description: Pizza Panic! Is a 1-4-player co-op cooking game where you and your friends try to keep your pizza parlor running for as long as possible. Work together, bake pizzas, earn money, buy upgrades and ensure you have the greatest pizza parlor of all time!

name: Grab & Run | Alpaca Party
description: Grab & Run | Alpaca Party is a physics-based multiplayer VR extraction adventure! The maps reshape every time, every object has real weight, and monsters are always watching. Team up with friends, embrace the chaos, and execute the perfect heist—or fail hilariously trying.

name: Iverian Wars: Craxion vs Defugel
description: Iverian Wars: Craxion vs Defugel is a faction-based strategic action MMORPG set in the world of Iveria. Engage in large-scale battles, customize your gear freely, and shape the fate of the continent through war and strategy.

name: Whippet At Large
description: Your owner has abandoned you yet again for something she calls a “job.” You must find her quickly before the lack of attention becomes fatal.

name: Novel Haven
description: Step into Novel Haven and transform a rundown lighthouse into a cozy bookstore. Help the villagers, arrange your favorite books, and decorate your own magical reading retreat!

name: Ze Gunner
description: Base Defense game where you control a turret system with unlimited ammo and need to protect your base com incomming enemies. When the enemies get close to you base they will start to fire. Each enemy type has a different firing rate. The screen will flash red if an enemy is shotting from behind.

name: Minus Nine
description: Secure the vaccine and escape the infested facility! Battle your way from B9 to the surface rescue chopper in this isometric roguelite shooter. Restore power, upgrade your gear with Bio-Samples, and protect humanity's last hope against endless waves of the infected.

name: Mainframe Men
description: Learn about the ancestors of your PC with this visual novel! ENIAC...UNIVAC... Wait, why are these machines so handsome?!

name: Tight Man
description: Tight Man is a fast-paced action roguelike where you use your own head as an explosive weapon. Explore dangerous dungeons, collect grotesque power-ups, and master the self-detonation mechanics to defeat hordes of enemies in this chaotic pixel-art shooter.

name: VOIDBLADE
description: An immersive 2D stealth platformer in which a Shadow Ninja must hide in and manipulate shadows using the power of the Void to sneak past deadly robots in space.

name: PengPong: Prologue
description: PengPong is a bullet-hell roguelike where pinball meets gambling. Bounce your way through chaos and bet it all to survive.

name: Sujefa
description: Sujefa is co-op puzzle platformer where two players can play as Rock, Paper or Scissors. Work together to solve puzzles and reach the end. Play online or locally on a shared screen.

name: Yapori Advance
description: Yapori Advance is a single-player precision platformer where you must overcome various obstacles to progress.

name: Trapped: Forced To Kill
description: Trapped: Forced to Kill is a psychological horror with multiple endings. Ciara Mori awakens in a strange Retreat under a cruel, cunning kidnapper’s control. To survive his deadly games, she must make difficult choices and face the unnerving tension that draws her closer to danger…and him.

name: Dino Age: The First Fracture
description: Awake in a prehistoric swamp and discover the primal world of Owen. In this standalone survival-RPG, you craft weapons, master skills like Hatching & Cooking, and battle ‘Corrupted’ dinosaurs. Defeat the Time Fracture Boss to save the Triassic Era.

name: Tai Chi Game
description: In this game, you pose the avatar for the awareness ball location. There are 9 possible moves in this game. You score 1 point for each correct pose.

name: Ling and the Corrupted Hollow
description: Explore a mythical world of a lost paradise as you help Ling and the spirits cleanse the home of the Hollow Woods in our third-person puzzle platforming game. With your spirits by your side, find the four soul shards and restore balance to the corrupted hollow.

name: 鬼島傳奇
description: Ghost Island Legend Death is just a new shift. In this corporate Roguelike, fight toxic bosses with a deck built from scraps. Craft "Dialysis Bubble Tea" and survive the grind. A psychological stress test where inflation is high and sanity is low. Can you flip the script? Welcome to the afterlife.

name: 蛙爷的进化之路
description: This is a multiplayer online word game! By obtaining monster cards, characters who evolve by fusing monster cards will gain new appearances and skills. Experience different professions with different weapons and equipment. Continuously unlocking new systems through evolution.

name: PUT OKO GHETTA SA 80 GRAMA: THE GAME
description: A fast and chaotic 2D balloon‑flying arcade game inspired by music album “Put oko Ghetta sa 80 grama”. Dodge obstacles, survive wild levels, and face the final laser challenge in Level 15. Simple controls, quick action, and a humorous vibe.

name: Jungbung's Life
description: 디시인사이드 중붕이의 삶은 평범한 백수인 주인공 "김중붕"의 삶을 체험하는 게임입니다. 중붕이가 되어 중갤타운에서 반가운 인물들을 만나고, "강력한" 적들을 상대하며, 황당한 사건들을 겪어보세요.

name: Competitive TicTacToe
description: Revolutionize the classic game. In this fast-paced strategy title, your oldest piece disappears once the board is full. No draws, just deep tactical gameplay. Think ahead, trap your opponent, and climb the global ELO leaderboards in a battle where every move counts.

name: 魔法桌宠 - MagicPet
developer: 你为啥直接commit到我的main分支啊
description: Magic Desktop Pet is a free, open-source, and lightweight desktop companion that blends productivity with charm. More than just a mascot, she serves as a versatile terminal to streamline your workflow—helping you launch webpages, save snippets, and perform instant searches or translations.

name: 凡人修仙传之韩老魔传奇
description: 凡人亦可逆天改命！这是一款深度还原原著的IDLE RPG大作。你将重走韩立的修仙之路，从七玄门的一介凡人，到叱咤三界的韩老魔。集结南宫婉、紫灵等红颜知己，御使噬金虫，炼制掌天瓶。就在此刻，开启你的飞升传说！

name: みつめ
description: "Mitsume" is a two-player cooperative horror game. Wander together through a dimly lit university campus and communicate to find "anomalies" that appear from only one player's perspective.

name: Project C.U.R.E. Origins
description: A Turn-Based RPG that follows the story of Kin on his journey to discover his past and the mysteries of this world. You, the player, must guide Kin and help him remember who he truly is and complete his mission.

name: League of Mahjong
description: Dive into League of Mahjong, the ultimate 3D collection of Taiwan Mahjong and Texas Hold'em! Featuring fair play mechanics, instant matchmaking, and hundreds of custom avatars. Play a round in just 5 minutes and master the table anytime, anywhere!

name: Euro3v3
description: Tactical Team Shooter to safely train you to control our new robots.
